# SEEHWA Green Foundation

Website: https://seehwagreen.org/
Canonical organization name: SEEHWA Green Foundation
Expanded name: Sustainable Ecology, Energy, HVAC, and Water Alliance
Entity type: Section 8 non-profit company headquartered in Ladakh, India
Primary email: seehwagreen@gmail.com
Phone: +91 88003 26282; +91 9186115322
Address: 12, Likir Labrang, Housing Colony, Leh, Ladakh 194101, India

## Site Pages

- Home: https://seehwagreen.org/
- About Us: https://seehwagreen.org/about.html
- Work: https://seehwagreen.org/work.html
- Our Team: https://seehwagreen.org/team.html
- Contribute: https://seehwagreen.org/contribute.html
- Contact: https://seehwagreen.org/contact.html
- Privacy Policy: https://seehwagreen.org/privacy.html

## Summary

SEEHWA Green Foundation works to advance the Sustainable Development Goals through practical, science-backed action in fragile high-altitude ecosystems. The organization focuses on resilient, net-zero and circular mountain communities rooted in local knowledge and strengthened by modern science.

## Focus Areas

- Sustainability: net-zero emissions, resource circularity and low-impact design.
- Energy & HVAC: renewable energy systems, passive solar buildings, decentralized microgrids, and low-energy heating and ventilation systems for extreme cold.
- Ecology: ecosystem regeneration, biodiversity conservation and nature-based solutions.
- Water and Waste Management: circular water systems, greywater reuse, sanitation and zero-waste solutions.
- Agri-Ecology: climate-smart agriculture, organic farming, composting and regenerative practices.
- Health: community-based healthcare access, preventive care and last-mile health infrastructure.
- Livelihood and Integrated Rural Development: infrastructure, education access and income generation for holistic wellbeing.
- Climate Resilience: adaptive infrastructure, community resilience planning and ecosystem-based approaches.

## Recognition

SEEHWA Green Foundation is a recipient of the 2026 NaropaCare Grant. NaropaCare supports locally rooted organizations addressing healthcare access challenges in Ladakh.
Reference: https://www.livetolove.org/naropacare


## Work Page Focus Sections

The Work page is organized into section-wise focus areas:

- Sustainability & Climate Resilience
- Energy & HVAC
- Ecology
- Water & Waste Management
- Agri-Ecology
- Health
- Livelihood & Integrated Rural Development

## Donation and Newsletter Status

The Contribute page covers volunteering, internships, CSR partnerships, technical collaboration, donations and newsletter updates. UPI, payment gateway and newsletter integrations are placeholders and should be connected after visual/content approval.
